# Sage Nord

> Sage Nord (legal entity: Saga ApS) is a software engineering studio based
> in Denmark. It helps product teams turn ideas into software and AI that
> ship, and hold up.

Mission: To empower people through software.
Defining value: Trust. Software reliable enough that people can depend on it.

## About
- A senior software studio. You work directly with the people doing the
  engineering, with no layers and no handoffs.
- Based in Denmark; serves the Nordics and Europe.
- Consulting, research, development, integration, and maintenance for
  software products and practical AI.

## Contact
- Email: hello@sagenord.com
- Website: https://sorunokoe.github.io/SageNord/ (moving to https://sagenord.com)
